title: THE DAY IN THE LIFE HBCU COLLEGE STUDENT VLOG | DURING COVID (FISK UNIVERSITY) —GENESIS ANAE
body:
Fisk Forever little sis!!! I love you and wish you the best!!! I was a RA in New Livingstone Hall!!! My room faced the magnolia trees!! They were so beautiful!! I am a proud silver!!!!!! Moreover you were already on my level the day you were excepted!!!💜💛💜💛 I spread my wing to you to let you know you are okay. Keep flapping your wings little one and fly high!!💜💛💜💛💜💛💜💛

HER SONS AND DAUGHTER'S ARE ALWAYS ON THE ALTER FISKITE!!!!!💛💜💛💜💛
author: @user-if4df7lk1z

title: FISK UNIVERSITY CAMPUS TOUR (HBCU) —GENESIS ANAE
body: Hey Fiskites! I enjoyed watching you guys give a virtual tour. It’s nice to see the campus through the eyes of current Fiskites, to hear you speak of long-standing traditions (such as not walking on the grass in front of the Oval) and to sense the same reverence and respect of the campus that Fiskites past have held, and continue to hold. It’s special that, no matter what, we are all connected as Fiskites, and Fisk will always be “home!” #FiskForever c/o 2010.
author: @stephanie.burton_lmhc

title: FISK UNIVERSITY CAMPUS TOUR (HBCU) —GENESIS ANAE

title: NASHVILLE TRAVEL VLOG: Fisk University Campus Tour + NPHC Greek Plots + & W. E. B. DuBois Statue
body: You walked right pass the Delta Que and Zetas plot. The Delta plot is to the right of Jubilee Hall 18:29, look on the ground , the Ques are in front of Adam K. Spence Hall 2:47 on the grass in front of building name and the Zetas were directly across from the Sigmas 5:08 right side. Sorry you missed them
author: @danaposley3884
